query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('customers', 'sms_log', 'leads', 'winback_campaigns', 'winback_messages', 'winback_sends', 'loyalty_points', 'loyalty_transactions', 'qa_questions', 'review_requests', 'vehicles') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('customers', 'sms_log', 'leads', 'winback_campaigns', 'winback_messages', 'winback_sends', 'loyalty_points', 'loyalty_transactions', 'qa_questions', 'review_requests', 'vehicles') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
stdout:

loyalty_transactions	PRIMARY	id
loyalty_transactions	idx_loyalty_tx_user	userId
loyalty_transactions	idx_loyalty_tx_type	type
loyalty_transactions	idx_loyalty_tx_created	createdAt
review_requests	PRIMARY	id
review_requests	idx_review_req_status	status
review_requests	idx_review_req_phone	phone
review_requests	idx_review_req_scheduled	scheduledAt
review_requests	idx_review_req_booking	bookingId
